config.neo4j.topic.cypher.${KAFKA_ENRICHED_GRAP: MERGE (p:Pipeline {name: event.pipeline}) SET p.environment = event.environment MERGE (app:FlinkApplication {name: event.flink_application}) SET app.environment = event.environment MERGE (topic:KafkaTopic {name: event.kafka_topic}) SET topic.environment = event.environment MERGE (schema:SchemaSubject {name: event.schema_subject}) SET schema.environment = event.environment MERGE (dt:DeltaTable {name: event.delta_table}) SET dt.environment = event.environment MERGE (sf:SnowflakeObject {name: event.snowflake_object}) SET sf.environment = event.environment MERGE (dash:Dashboard {name: event.dashboard}) SET dash.environment = event.environment MERGE (team:OwnerTeam {name: event.owner_team}) MERGE (team)-[:OWNS]->(p) MERGE (p)-[:RUNS_AS]->(app) MERGE (app)-[:CONSUMES_FROM]->(topic) MERGE (topic)-[:USES_SCHEMA]->(schema) MERGE (app)-[:PRODUCES]->(dt) MERGE (dt)-[:EXPORTED_TO]->(sf) MERGE (dash)-[:READS_FROM]->(sf)
